entries.title: SourceAnchor.unit_kind not marked required in schema
entries.closure_note: Removed unit_kind from required array — codegen already treats it as optional due to nested allOf/items limitation. Schema now matches generated output.

entries.title: Integration test coverage for World and WorldMembership contract roundtrip
entries.closure_note: Added test_world_domain_contract_roundtrip and test_world_membership_domain_contract_roundtrip. MembershipRole schema/domain drift documented in test comment.

entries.title: Error message ergonomics and domain error variant coverage
entries.closure_note: Added Display/ToString tests for all 18 error variants. Added #[allow(dead_code)] to unused CreatorQuotaExceeded and InvalidIdFormat with V1.1 TODO comment.
